principles: Every returned applicable portfolio must pass final invariants after solver or fallback.
Fallback is allowed only when explicitly compliant and traceable.
Missing exposure is an uncertainty state, not 0 percent equity.
Frontend may display warnings, but must not apply non-compliant portfolios.

rules: positive weights only for used_assets unless explicitly classified as missing/zeroed
filtered tiny weights must be renormalized or surfaced as residual

missing_exposure_contract.profiles_1_to_4: block or review unless safe low-risk classification and usable exposure source exists
missing_exposure_contract.profiles_5_to_10: allow only with explicit missing_exposure warning and conservative fallback bucket

final_statuses.frontend_action: may open review with warning banner
may open review with explicit fallback acceptance

P0.goal: Prevent incorrect applicable portfolios and data-contract corruption.

fixes.title: Final validator after solver and fallback
fixes.design: Introduce validate_optimizer_result(weights, used_assets, exposure_vectors, constraints, explainability) as a pure helper. It recalculates sums, finite values, constraints, lock compliance, data readiness, and returns compliance_status plus violations.

fixes.title: Safe finite non-negative weight normalization
fixes.design: Replace current normalization use with a strict sanitizer: reject non-finite values, clamp only where explicitly safe, and never preserve a negative numerator. If the source is solver output, reject rather than silently clamp.

fixes.title: Suitability missing exposure guard
fixes.design: Require has_usable_v2_exposure for low/conservative profiles unless a specific safe low-risk class and cash/bond exposure source is present. Return reason missing_v2_exposure rather than treating real_eq as 0.

fixes.title: Frontend fallback gating and weight display invariant
fixes.design: Update result handling contract so fallback_non_compliant is blocked. Enforce displayed percent sum invariant after rounding/filtering, or show residual/unallocated amount.

P1.goal: Make constraint semantics explicit and pre-solver feasibility stronger.

fixes.title: vol_band hard constraint or explicit warning mode
fixes.design: Decide policy: strict mode treats vol_band breach as non-compliant; non-strict mode returns optimal_with_warnings with achieved_vol/target_vol/vol_band diagnostics.

fixes.title: Max-attainable bucket precheck
fixes.design: For each bucket min, compute maximum attainable exposure after locked weights and max_weight constraints. Block before solver when min > attainable + tolerance.

fixes.title: Visible relaxed constraints and fallback source diagnostics
fixes.design: Propagate group source diagnostics, asset_mix scale diagnostics, skipped constraints, relaxed_constraints and legacy fallback counts into result.warnings/explainability.

P2.goal: Improve tactical truthfulness, recommendation disclosure and reproducibility.

fixes.title: Tactical and recommendation traceability
fixes.design: Expose tactical requested/applied/dropped counts and recommendation tier/commercial sort disclosure. Mark local smart portfolios preview_only.

fixes.title: Run reproducibility stamps
fixes.design: Return run_id, request_hash, universe_hash, rf_source, rf_timestamp, optimizer_version, constraints_version and data/cache source stamps.

fixes.title: Optimizer no-write/no-network audit mode
fixes.design: Add execution_mode flags for no_write/no_snapshot/no_network so audits can call optimizer without risk_free_rate cache writes or optimizer snapshot writes.

rollout_rules: Ship P0 tests before P0 runtime patch.
P0 runtime patch must not alter optimizer objective math except to reject/label invalid results.
P1 can alter constraint compliance statuses; compare before/after outputs on synthetic profiles.
P2 is mostly telemetry/disclosure and should not change weights unless no-write mode is requested.
